existing_features.title: Create a Contact Us page displaying the company's email address, phone number, and physical location/address. The page should be accessible from the main navigation and styled consistently with the existing site theme.

Update the Project Gallery page to allow admin users to upload new photos directly from the gallery page. The upload button must only be visible to authenticated admin users. Non-admin users continue to browse gallery photos as before.

Update the Services page to reflect the current and correct list of services offered by Nellore Print Hub. Ensure all four service categories (Digital Printing, Flex & Banner, Offset Printing, Creative Design) are accurately described with relevant features and call-to-action buttons.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a route and backend endpoint for the Contact Us page data (email, phone, location) so admins can manage contact details. Store contact info in the backend and expose a public read endpoint.
